tasks.description: Verify OpenCode startup time without password
steps: docker run --rm -e GITHUB_TOKEN=test -e ORCHESTRATOR_URL=http://test -e INTERNAL_API_TOKEN=test -e TASK='test' -e REPO='test/test' devbox:test bash -c 'timeout 10 opencode serve > /dev/null 2>&1 & sleep 2 && curl -f http://localhost:4096/global/health'
Health check responds within 5 seconds
Container doesn't timeout (exit code 0)
